---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts          # drop post .qmd files (or folders) under blog/posts/
  type: default            # try: default | table | grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

_Nothing here yet — add posts under `blog/posts/`._
